channel.title: Linux_Kernel on jmpfbmx
channel.description: Recent content in Linux_Kernel on jmpfbmx

item.title: How to build a kernel using GCC?
item.description: Hi, Today will explain you how to build a kernel using GCC toolchain. What will you need for Android Building? A computer with: At least 4GB of RAM. 10GB free as maximum Being familiar with Linux. 1st.- We need to clone our kernel source or download it from the brand opensource webpage. 2nd.- We need to know the arch of our kernel source before start cloning the toolchain.
